requirement_topic.en: EMC — IEC 62920 and IEC 61000 Evidence for PV Inverters

summary.en: Guatemala PV inverter EMC expectations should be confirmed against COGUANOR-adopted standards, CNEE or distributor project specifications, and procurement requirements. For internationally supplied grid-tied inverters, the practical evidence package commonly relies on IEC 62920 for photovoltaic power conversion equipment EMC and relevant IEC 61000 series tests, including harmonic current and immunity tests where applicable. Because Guatemala operates at 60 Hz and 120/240 V low-voltage service, EMC and harmonics documentation should identify the tested voltage, frequency, firmware, and model configuration.
summary.zh: 危地马拉光伏逆变器EMC要求应结合COGUANOR采纳标准、CNEE或配电商项目规格及采购要求确认。对于国际供应的并网逆变器，实际证据包通常依赖IEC 62920光伏功率变换设备EMC，以及适用的IEC 61000系列测试，包括谐波电流和抗扰度测试。由于危地马拉采用60 Hz和120/240 V低压供电，EMC和谐波文件应识别测试电压、频率、固件和型号配置。
summary.zht: 瓜地馬拉光伏逆變器EMC要求應結合COGUANOR採納標準、CNEE或配電商項目規格及採購要求確認。對於國際供應的併網逆變器，實際證據包通常依賴IEC 62920光伏功率轉換設備EMC，以及適用的IEC 61000系列測試，包括諧波電流和抗擾度測試。由於瓜地馬拉採用60 Hz和120/240 V低壓供電，EMC和諧波文件應識別測試電壓、頻率、韌體和型號配置。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000 series — Electromagnetic compatibility test and limit standards, including harmonic current emission and immunity standards where applicable
COGUANOR — Guatemalan national standards adoption and conformity context

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC evidence is commonly tied to GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and China domestic laboratory reports. These tests may use IEC 61000-family methods, but the certificate scope, limits, grid conditions, and report language may not match the IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 evidence expected by a Guatemala importer, distributor, CNEE project reviewer, or project owner. A China EMC certificate also typically reflects 50 Hz / 220-380 V configuration rather than Guatemala's 60 Hz / 120-240 V grid.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC证据通常对应GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和中国国内实验室报告。这些测试可能采用IEC 61000系列方法，但证书范围、限值、电网条件和报告语言未必符合危地马拉进口商、配电商、CNEE项目审查方或项目业主预期的IEC 62920 / IEC 61000证据。中国EMC证书通常也反映50 Hz / 220-380 V配置，而非危地马拉60 Hz / 120-240 V电网。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC證據通常對應GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和中國國內實驗室報告。這些測試可能採用IEC 61000系列方法，但證書範圍、限值、電網條件和報告語言未必符合瓜地馬拉進口商、配電商、CNEE項目審查方或項目業主預期的IEC 62920 / IEC 61000證據。中國EMC證書通常也反映50 Hz / 220-380 V配置，而非瓜地馬拉60 Hz / 120-240 V電網。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2019 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters) — includes EMC requirements
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: China GB/T EMC testing does not automatically demonstrate Guatemala-acceptable IEC EMC evidence. Exporters should prepare IEC 62920 and relevant IEC 61000 reports for the exact inverter model, power rating, firmware, and grid configuration. Where prior EMC or harmonic reports were tested only at Chinese grid conditions, confirm whether the importer, distributor, or project engineer requires retesting or engineering assessment at 60 Hz / 120-240 V.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T EMC测试不会自动证明已具备危地马拉可接受的IEC EMC证据。出口商应准备针对确切逆变器型号、功率等级、固件和电网配置的IEC 62920及相关IEC 61000报告。若既有EMC或谐波报告仅在中国电网条件下测试，应确认进口商、配电商或项目工程师是否要求按60 Hz / 120-240 V重新测试或进行工程评估。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T EMC測試不會自動證明已具備瓜地馬拉可接受的IEC EMC證據。出口商應準備針對確切逆變器型號、功率等級、韌體和電網配置的IEC 62920及相關IEC 61000報告。若既有EMC或諧波報告僅在中國電網條件下測試，應確認進口商、配電商或項目工程師是否要求按60 Hz / 120-240 V重新測試或進行工程評估。

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent and often mandatory through COGUANOR conformity expectations, CNEE/distributor technical review, or procurement specifications for grid-tied PV equipment
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary or certification-scheme dependent in China; domestic GB/T EMC evidence is not a Guatemala acceptance decision

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not rely on a China GB/T EMC certificate alone for Guatemala PV inverter projects. Build an IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC file that names the exact model, firmware, voltage, and 60 Hz configuration, then confirm with the importer, COGUANOR conformity route, distributor, or project engineer whether supplementary testing is required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应仅依赖中国GB/T EMC证书用于危地马拉光伏逆变器项目。应建立IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC文件，明确确切型号、固件、电压和60 Hz配置，并向进口商、COGUANOR合格评定路径、配电商或项目工程师确认是否需要补充测试。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應僅依賴中國GB/T EMC證書用於瓜地馬拉光伏逆變器項目。應建立IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC文件，明確確切型號、韌體、電壓和60 Hz配置，並向進口商、COGUANOR合格評定路徑、配電商或項目工程師確認是否需要補充測試。
